creator: dgilbert@dclg.ca
text:
Further to my submission, I grabbed the wine port with the files as of
two weeks ago (before the update to 0.9.42 from 0.9.41) and installed
it.  Repeatably, eve-online works with 0.9.41 and not with 0.9.42.

Dave.
